style: Short, punchy arcade space-combat voice barks. Energetic, clean delivery, no trailing silence.

speakers.name: Vega
speakers.style: Composed, confident female fighter ace in her 30s. Calm authority.

speakers.name: Hex
speakers.style: Cocky, energetic young male hotshot pilot. Grinning bravado.

speakers.name: Anvil
speakers.style: Massive, gravelly, unshakable male veteran. Slow and heavy.

speakers.name: Computer
speakers.style: Calm synthetic ship-computer announcer. Clear, measured, slightly robotic.
